raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Affirming and publicly declaring a set of self-directed behavioral intentions",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "The speaker has previously tended to abandon self-connection in order to please others",
    "Breath awareness is a reliable method for remaining present during difficult moments",
    "Self-connection is both attainable and preferable to interpersonal accommodation as a default priority"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "Internally consistent; each clause reinforces the central value of prioritizing self-connection without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "The speaker treats the statements as actionable reminders that are revisited and enacted in real time rather than as static declarations",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "The statements are used to justify emotional withdrawal, relational avoidance, or the neglect of legitimate responsibilities while claiming moral or psychological superiority"
}
